caption: A man with white hair and glasses, wearing a black button-down shirt, is seated in a television studio. He is positioned in front of several monitors displaying stock market data, colorful charts, and graphs. A blue backdrop with a grid pattern is visible behind him. At the bottom of the screen, a blue and white banner contains the text "A FREQUENT CONTRIBUTOR TO THE TD AMERITRADE NETWORK & CNBC". The "Tiger-TV" logo appears in the top right corner of the scene. Throughout the clip, the man is gesturing with his hands while speaking, moving his right hand upward and outward across the frames. The background monitors and the on-screen text banner remain static, while the man's posture and hand positions shift slightly as he continues his delivery.
